narrative:
Colerain Cc (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,187 registered voters, with 69.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.4 percentage points.
